version_pin_rationale: libelf1 0.188-1~bpo22.04.1 is the jammy backports build (preferred over the older 0.186-1build1 release-pocket build because Mesa 23.2's GBM backend probes ELF symbol tables via libelf 0.187+ API). THIS WAS THE HIDDEN DE0-G DEP CALLED OUT BY THE DE0-G REPORT — Mesa's libgbm.so.1 dlopens libelf.so.1 at first GBM-buffer-import call; without it Mesa emits 'GBM: ELF probe failed' and Hyprland/sway's DRM backend can't allocate scanout buffers. NOTE: the .deb ships the file as libelf-0.188.so (with the version embedded) and the libelf.so.1 SONAME as a symlink (visible via dpkg-deb -c). DE-H1's build script extracts BOTH but writes the SONAME link itself for relocatability (matches DE0-G's libdrm pattern).
